ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorites" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "nametype" TEXT /* Type of name (e.g., Valid, Rejected) */,
  "recclass" TEXT /* Classification of the meteorite */,
  "mass_g" REAL /* Mass of the meteorite in grams */,
  "fall" TEXT /* Type of fall (e.g., Fell, Found) */,
  "impact_year" INTEGER /* Year the meteorite fell */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the meteorite was discovered */,
  "discovery_method" TEXT /* Method of discovery (e.g., eye witness, geological survey) */,
  "discovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the meteorite was discovered */,
  "current_storage_location" TEXT /* Current storage location of the meteorite */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator responsible for the meteorite */,
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_geolocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("geolocation_id") REFERENCES geolocations ("geolocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "parent_classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent classification (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocations" (
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the meteorite was found */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the meteorite was found */,
  "city" TEXT /* City or town where the meteorite was found */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geolocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_geolocations" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  "discovery_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the discovery location (e.g., precise, approximate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id", "geolocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., classification, mass, geolocation) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_details" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata entry */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id", "old_value", "new_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_details_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date of query execution */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., success, error) */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "result_text" TEXT /* Text of the query result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the query result (e.g., success, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id", "meteorite_id")
)
